# DEPRECATED — do not use for course pipeline

Previous teammate path vendored [dataabc/weibo-search](https://github.com/dataabc/weibo-search) (Scrapy).

**Current Lab1 crawler:** `crawl4weibo` via `scripts/run_weibo_crawl.py`
and `src/lab1_collection/crawler.py`.

This `third_party/weibo-search` tree is kept only for historical reference and
may be deleted once the team confirms crawl4weibo is stable.
